h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now, the marginal note is not the rescued crown, it is another object under glass with its own fingerprints.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was moving steadily toward accepting the two-pin structure while repeatedly flagging uncertainty about how to weigh the marginal source, so the next step was expected to be further refinement of that same uncertainty.
